title: REAL DEAL with Tony Reali
author: iHeartPodcasts
description:
REAL DEAL with Tony Reali is a sports culture podcast built around one irresistible moment at a time. A play. A clip. A photo. A legend. The cultural touchstones of sports that never leave us. Every episode starts small and goes deep into the story behind the story, the feeling behind the moment, and the human truth that explains why it's still living rent-free in our heads years later.
 
Hosted by longtime ESPN personality Tony Reali, REAL DEAL blends storytelling, humor, nostalgia, emotional insight, and unpredictable energy with guests who complete the story. Athletes, broadcasters, superfans, comedians, journalists and the people nobody else would think to call.
 
This is neither a debate show nor a recap show. It’s an evergreen sports culture format built around the moments, stories, and emotional chaos that keep sports alive, always.

title: Around the Pod
author: Around the Pod
description:
Four hosts. Two Australian pros. Two passionate amateurs. One obsession: pickleball.


Join Australian pros Aaron Blitz and Josh Chia alongside passionate pickleballers Justin McLeod and Michael Murrell as they dive into everything happening in the world's fastest-growing sport. From tournaments, tactics and the latest news to stories from life on and off the court, every episode blends elite insight with the perspective of everyday players. Featuring guests from across the pickleball world, Around the Pod is the podcast for anyone who loves the game — whether you're just getting started or competing at the highest level.

title: The Bad Neighborhood Podcast
author: Bazzi
description: The Bad Neighborhood Podcast is a scripted excavation of the human condition. We don't offer tips, tricks, or magic cures—we use carefully chosen words to hold up a mirror to the 'bad neighborhood' inside our own minds, refusing to hide from the truths we are too terrified to speak aloud. Here, we battle both our internal monsters and the real-world monsters who hide not behind a mask, but behind a human face.

title: The Mind Room Podcast With Dr Orgen
author: Dr. David Rex Orgen
description:
Welcome to The Mind Room Podcast—a place where faith, mental wellness, personal growth, and meaningful conversations come together. Hosted by Dr. David Rex Orgen, each episode is designed to inspire hope, strengthen resilience, and provide practical guidance for navigating life’s challenges.
Whether you’re seeking encouragement, emotional healing, leadership insights, or practical tools for personal development, The Mind Room Podcast is here to support your journey toward a healthier mind and a purpose-filled life.
Stay Connected With Us:

title: Over Simulated
author: Lady Drama, Not Malcolm
description: Join Not Malcolm and Lady Drama in a weekly conversation about the gaming industry, life simulation video games, and influencers

title: My Migrant Soul
author: Imran Abul Kashem
description:
My Migrant Soul – A Podcast by Imran Abul Kashem
Stories of Resilience, Struggles, and Success in a New Land
Every migrant has a story—of dreams, struggles, and triumphs. My Migrant Soul brings you powerful, real-life conversations with migrants from diverse backgrounds who have navigated the challenges of starting over in a new land. Hosted by Imran Abul Kashem, this podcast sheds light on personal migration journeys, cultural transitions, and the resilience that fuels success.
Through heartfelt interviews, we celebrate the courage, sacrifices, and victories of those who dared to chase a better future. Tune in for inspiring stories that remind us of the strength within every migrant soul.

title: Multicultural Newborn Photography
author: Basu Photogrpahy
description:
If you’re looking for a trusted Multicultural Newborn Photography Studio Winnipeg, Basu Photography Services provides professional, customized newborn photography that beautifully captures both your baby’s first days and your family’s unique traditions.

title: Conversations On Eternity
author: Chinwe Onwuchekwa
description:
In a world marked by uncertainty about life, death, and what lies beyond, Conversations on Eternity – The Christian Perspective provides a clear, biblical, and compelling exploration of one of humanity’s most profound questions: What happens after this life? 


Through sound biblical teaching, engaging discussions, and practical spiritual insights, the podcast  seeks to illuminate God's truth, strengthen faith, and provide clear direction for those searching for meaning, hope, and eternal purpose.


Whether you are a committed believer, a seeker exploring matters of faith, or someone wrestling with life's ultimate questions, Conversations on Eternity offers a compelling invitation to consider what matters most - not only for this life, but for the life to come.

title: The Sea Wolf
author: Dream audio books
description: The Sea-Wolf by Jack London is one of the greatest adventure novels ever written, combining survival, philosophy, and psychological conflict into an unforgettable maritime journey. This unabridged audiobook follows Humphrey Van Weyden, an intellectual who is rescued after a shipwreck only to find himself trapped aboard the brutal sealing schooner Ghost. Commanded by the legendary Captain Wolf Larsen, a brilliant yet ruthless leader, the voyage becomes a gripping battle of strength, intelligence, and morality. As the ship crosses the icy waters of the North Pacific, Van Weyden must adapt to the harsh realities of life at sea while confronting one of literature's most fascinating antiheroes. Filled with violent storms, dramatic sea battles, unforgettable characters, and profound reflections on human nature, The Sea-Wolf remains a timeless classic. Listen online for free and experience Jack London's masterpiece in this complete unabridged audiobook, brought to you by DreamAudiobooks.

title: Among the Jungle Podcast
author: Botanist, Shii Kaina
description:
Welcome to Among the Jungle Podcast hosted by botanist, horticulturist and environmental activist, Shii Kaina. With years over a decade of experience in the field and a deep passion for the natural world, Shii is your guide to unlocking the secrets of natural biophilic design, plant care, organic gardening,  sustainable living and beyond.
Whether you're a seasoned gardener or just starting out, Among the Jungle Podcast will help you deepen your connection with the earth and live in reciprocity with all of nature. From practical gardening tips to thought-provoking discussions on hot-button plant topics, we cover a wide range of plant magic, all with a common goal: to promote RECIPROCITY. 
Our vibrant approach to plant and nature topics will leave you feeling energized and inspired to take action for yourself, your community and your planet. So come join plant enthusiasts and experts from around the world, HERE on Among the Jungle Podcast where we blur the lines between indoors and outdoors by bringing more nature inside and our people outside!

title: More Than Minutes Played
author: Noah Cavanaugh
description:
When injury hits, performance drops, or the game turns on you, what do you fall back on?
Former professional footballer Noah Cavanaugh explores identity, performance psychology, and life outside sport through conversations with elite athletes and sports industry experts. 
On the More Than Minutes Played podcast, Noah aims to uncover stories about athlete crisis moments and navigating these to maintain peak performance on and off the field.
New episodes weekly.

title: Bible (KJV) NT 05: Acts by King James Version (KJV)
author: Audiobooks, Podcasts and More
description: Acts tells the story of the Apostolic Age of the Early Christian church, with particular emphasis on the ministry of the Twelve Apostles and of Paul of Tarsus. The early chapters, set in Jerusalem, discuss Jesus' Resurrection and Great Commission, his Ascension with a prophecy to return, the start of the Twelve Apostles' ministry, and the Day of Pentecost. The later chapters discuss Paul's conversion, his ministry, and finally his arrest and imprisonment and trip to Rome. (Introduction by Wikipedia)

title: Diversity Podcast

description: A brief discussion of my perspectives on topics related to human diversity.

title: The Pop Agenda
author: Anthony Cesar Duncan
description: The Pop Agenda is your ultimate all-access pass to the creators shaping pop culture today. Hosted by Anthony, we dive deep into the minds of the people behind the art. Every episode, we sit down with a diverse lineup of musicians, actors, filmmakers, writers, performers, and creators across the entertainment universe to explore the raw stories behind their success.

title: Browsec Inc
author: Linda Buie
description:
Browsec is a fast, reliable, and secure VPN service trusted by over 8 million users worldwide. With Browsec, you can browse the internet safely, protect your privacy, and access content without restrictions. It encrypts your traffic and hides your real IP address, ensuring secure and anonymous browsing on any device. Browsec offers servers in over 40 locations, delivering seamless connectivity and high-speed performance for streaming, gaming, and general browsing. Available as a browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Opera, as well as mobile apps for iOS and Android, Browsec ensures online freedom wherever you are.

description: Reading through the B•I•B•L•E with two recovering drama queens. ✨

title: The Gold Wine Company
author: David West
description:
Welcome to The Gold Wine Company—the ultimate community for casual entertainers and anyone looking for a smooth reset after a long day.
We believe great wine shouldn't be complicated, overly sweet, bitter, or dry.
We are detailing the journey of crafting the perfect, smooth "in-between" wine blends packaged in premium 250ml slim cans, built specifically for your post-work decompression and stress-free hosting.
Tune in weekly to our podcast for practical hosting hacks, low-stress girls' night layouts, and a relaxing space to clock out and unwind.

title: The Genius of Birds — Bird Lens
author: Bird Lens
description: The Genius of Birds — Bird Lens is an independent educational companion to the science of avian intelligence. Hosts Sheila and Victor turn research on bird brains and behavior into clear, interactive conversations that build from essential terms to experiments, edge cases, and practical observation. Follow crows, parrots, pigeons, and other remarkable birds as the series explores neurons, tool use, memory, navigation, communication, social learning, and the changing science of animal minds. Each episode is evidence-led, accessible, and designed to be easy to follow. Presented by the Bird Lens app. Learn more and continue exploring at https://birdlens.app.

title: RedPlum Games Podcast
author: RedPlum Games
description: The RedPlum Games podcast series built for anyone curious about the booming world of skill-based amusement gaming from the operators running venues and arcades, to the players who love the machines, to industry insiders who want a closer look at the companies shaping the future of gaming entertainment.

title: Oklahoma Family Law & Divorce Guide
author: Whitchurch & Associates, PLLC
description:
Oklahoma Family Law & Divorce Guide shares practical legal information for people facing divorce, custody disputes, protective orders, guardianships, and related family law matters in Oklahoma.


Whitchurch & Associates, PLLC is an Oklahoma City law firm focused on clear communication, practical strategy, and steady support during stressful legal situations. The firm handles family law, estate planning, and personal injury matters.


This podcast includes audio versions of blog posts from Whitchurch & Associates, PLLC, including How to Divorce a Narcissist in Oklahoma. This episode explains how high-conflict behavior, manipulation, financial pressure, and parenting disputes can affect an Oklahoma divorce, and why documentation, temporary orders, and clear boundaries matter.


This podcast is for informational purposes only and doesn't constitute legal advice, and no attorney-client relationship is formed by listening to this segment. Please consult with an attorney for specific legal advice.

title: The ISO Journey
author: Critical Path & PJR Certification
description:
👋 Welcome to Critical Path UK.
Our monthly podcast, created in collaboration with PJR Certification, is here to make ISO feel clearer, simpler and a lot less overwhelming.
🎙️ Hosted by Megan, Head of Marketing at Critical Path, each episode features relaxed, informal conversations with Tom, Director at PJR Certification, and Matt, Director at Critical Path.
We’ll be talking about ISO consultancy, auditing, certification, management systems and the real questions businesses ask when starting, preparing for or maintaining their ISO certification.

title: INONDA

description: Speaking with founders and thought leaders about business and the new world.

description: A safe place to turn the page, be heard without a word, come back to what's important, and be unified through transparency in our walks with Christ. Sit down with Nick, Hunter, Lauren and Ellie and listen as they have transparent conversations about what the Lord is teaching them.

author: Ben Meijer
description: Ben Meijer is therapeut en gespecialiseerd in derealisatie, depersonalisatie en dissociatieve stoornissen. In 2003 werd hij EFT-therapeut en richtte hij zich aanvankelijk op bloosangst, sociale fobieën, burn-out, hoofdpijn en migraine – klachten die leiden tot ziekteverzuim.

title: Ripudia
author: Chora Media - EMERGENCY
description:
La pace non è solo l’assenza di guerra, è anche una scelta da portare avanti e costruire con le parole e con le azioni. Oggi più che mai, è una scelta urgente. 

In questa serie podcast, cinque tra le voci più autorevoli del giornalismo e della cultura italiana ci accompagnano in una riflessione sul significato della pace e sulla necessità di riportarla al centro del dibattito pubblico. Perché è proprio nel cuore dell'articolo 11 della Costituzione italiana, che trova spazio una parola tanto netta quanto potente: ripudia.

Ripudia è una serie podcast di Chora Media per EMERGENCY, con il contributo di Tomaso Montanari, Francesca Mannocchi, Marco Damilano, Simone Pieranni e Mario Calabresi.


CREDITS

author: Darrell Ginsberg Dentist
description: Modern dentistry requires excellent patient care alongside efficient practice management. Darrell Ginsberg Dentist demonstrates how combining clinical expertise, technology, and leadership helps dental practices deliver better treatment while improving daily operations. This balanced approach supports patient satisfaction, stronger teamwork, sustainable growth, and long-term success in an increasingly competitive healthcare environment.

title: IFS Zooms In: The Economy
author: Institute for Fiscal Studies

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

description: This Is Me - Mary C, is exactly what it sounds like - me, sharing my life honestly & openly. I'm a woman of faith, a crafter, & I love rustic, boho, one-of-a-kind beauty. My crafts are "Imperfectly made, Intentionally loved." Here I’ll share my faith woven into everyday living, & an inside look at the creation of the goods in my shop. Everything I make, share, & put into the world is offered with love, intention & heart.

title: 中年オタクの憂鬱
author: 文化放送エクステンド
description:
気づけば仲間がオタ卒してたり。親の背中が小さく見えたり。
ふと夜中に孤独を感じたり──。
まだまだ現役中年オタクなあなたが抱える憂鬱を、声優・後藤邑子が受け止めます。
真面目な悩みから、取るに足らない小さなモヤモヤまで。チープでクールな中年たちに、禁則事項はありません。
聴けばちょっと気が晴れて、ちょっとユカイな明日がくる。
そんな耳のサードプレイス型・お悩み共有番組が「中年オタクの憂鬱」です。

番組では「中年オタクの憂鬱」を募集します。真面目な悩みから、取るに足らない小さなモヤモヤまで。オタクならではの「悩み」「失敗談」「困った話」など番組パーソナリティーの後藤邑子に聞いて欲しい話を送ってきてください。
【番組概要】
タイトル：中年のオタクの憂鬱
出演：後藤邑子（声優）
配信：隔週火曜日予定（初回配信日：7月14日）

title: The Villainz Lair
author: The Villainz Lair
description: Welcome to The Villain's Lair, the ultimate destination for deep-dive geek culture, cinematic analysis, and unfiltered conversations with the creators shaping our favorite worlds. Hosted by Emmy Award-winning producers, each episode pulls back the curtain on comic books, sci-fi, and entertainment news. From analyzing the complex psychology of modern cinema to exclusive, hard-hitting interviews with industry insiders, actors, and comic book artists, we break down the stories you love without the fluff. Step inside the lair—your weekly dose of pop culture insight starts here. DC & Marvel Fans!

title: The Mind of Us
author: Adelaide O
description: The Mind of Us explores the psychology behind everyday human experiences—overthinking, rejection, loneliness, relationships, identity, and more. Through research and reflection, each episode helps us better understand why we think, feel, and behave the way we do. Because sometimes, understanding ourselves helps us feel a little less alone. Follow to never miss an episode.

title: Vietnam Content Marketing
author: Seven Million Bikes Podcasts | Saigon Podcast Studio
description:
Vietnam is one of the fastest-changing markets in Asia. But reaching the people who live, work, and buy here takes more than simply translating an overseas campaign. 


Vietnam Content Marketing explores how brands, creators, and businesses build trust, grow audiences, and tell better stories in Vietnam. Through conversations with marketers, founders, and industry leaders, we uncover what works, what doesn't, and what connects with Vietnam consumers across social media, video, podcast, search, and beyond. 


It's practical, honest, and focused on the realities of doing business in this market. Whether you're building a local brand, entering Vietnam for the first time, or trying to understand where the industry is heading, this show gives you the ideas and insights to create content that actually makes an impact. 


I'm Niall Mackay from Seven Million Bikes Podcast and Saigon Podcast Studio, and this is Vietnam Content Marketing.

title: Small Biotechs; Big Decisions
author: Norstella
description:
A limited podcast series exploring the challenges and opportunities facing emerging biotech companies today. Hosted by Daniel Chancellor, VP of Thought Leadership at Norstella, and Claire Riches, VP of Clinical Solutions at Citeline, each episode shares the truth about the current biotech landscape covering market dynamics, regulatory shifts, and strategic decisions to help biotech leaders navigate uncertainties and drive innovation.

View the video series and find out more information here: www.citeline.com/biotech

title: Pleasure Is Not a Luxury — It's a Path to Abundance
author: Fay Savery
description:
Have you ever wondered why manifestation can feel exhausting, even when you're doing "all the right things"?
In this first episode of The Ecstatic Abundance Podcast, Fayannie shares the philosophy that inspired the Ecstatic Abundance Academy and explains why abundance isn't created through constant hustle—but through presence, embodiment, and learning how to receive.
Together we'll explore how your breath, your body, and your nervous system influence your relationship with prosperity, creativity, and joy.
This episode is an invitation to slow down.

Sermon podcasts of Christ Alone Lutheran Church, located in Ammon, Idaho.

title: Rise & Stride, Mama
author: Susan Ammons
description:
Rise & Stride, Mama
Every Tide, Every Stride, and Every Mama.

Motherhood is a journey filled with changing tides, unexpected turns, and countless moments of growth. Join hosts Susan Ammons and guests as they dive into honest conversations about motherhood, womanhood, personal growth, and navigating life's seasons with grace and resilience.

From the joys and challenges of raising children to rediscovering yourself, building community, pursuing passions, and embracing change, Rise & Stride, Mama is a place where every story matters and every mama belongs.

Whether you're rocking a newborn, cheering from the sidelines, navigating an empty nest, or finding your footing through a new chapter, this podcast offers encouragement, inspiration, and connection for every tide, every stride, and every mama.

title: Công Ty Sơn Mỹ Thuật Conpa
author: công ty sơn nghệ thuật Conpa
description:
CONPA được hình thành từ niềm đam mê với vật liệu hoàn thiện và mong muốn mang đến những trải nghiệm mới cho không gian kiến trúc. Vì vậy, CONPA tập trung nghiên cứu và phát triển các dòng sơn hiệu ứng có khả năng tái hiện vẻ đẹp của bê tông, đá và những chất liệu tự nhiên theo cách tinh tế và hiện đại hơn.

Long before today's political battles, cultural confusion, and social division, there were ideas that shaped our nation, our communities, and our families. Somewhere along the way, many of those ideas were forgotten—or intentionally replaced.
From politics and government to faith, family, education, history, and everyday life, we'll examine today's biggest issues through the lens of yesterday's timeless principles. We'll separate facts from narratives, challenge popular assumptions, and ask the questions too many people are afraid to ask.
Whether you agree with every conclusion or not, you'll leave every episode thinking more deeply than when you started.
Because today's headlines didn't happen overnight. They were built on yesterday's ideas.

title: आज की राजनीती और देश
author: Moti Singh Rathore
description:
🎙️ पॉडकास्ट लेख – “राजनीति और देश”

प्रस्तावना (Intro):
"नमस्कार दोस्तों, स्वागत है आपका हमारे पॉडकास्ट में। आज का विषय है – राजनीति और देश। राजनीति केवल सत्ता की कुर्सी का खेल नहीं है, बल्कि यह उस व्यवस्था का नाम है जो हमारे देश की दिशा और दशा तय करती है। जब हम राजनीति को समझते हैं, तो असल में हम अपने देश के भविष्य को समझते हैं।"

मुख्य भाग (Body):
"हमारा देश भारत – दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा लोकतंत्र। यहाँ हर नागरिक को वोट देने का अधिकार है, अपनी आवाज़ उठाने का हक़ है। लेकिन सवाल यह है कि क्या हम राजनीति को सिर्फ नेताओं और पार्टियों तक सीमित मानते हैं?

राजनीति केवल संसद या विधानसभा में नहीं होती। यह हर जगह होती है – पंचायत से लेकर नगर निगम तक, गाँव की चौपाल से लेकर सोशल मीडिया तक। राजनीति हमारे स्कूल, कॉलेज, दफ्तर और यहां तक कि घर तक प्रभावित करती है।

कहा जाता है – 'अगर अच्छे लोग राजनीति से दूर रहेंगे, तो बुरे लोग राजनीति पर कब्जा कर लेंगे।' इसलिए राजनीति से भागना नहीं, बल्कि उसमें जागरूक भागीदारी करना ही सच्ची देशसेवा है।

आज देश को ऐसी राजनीति चाहिए जो विकास, शिक्षा, रोज़गार और समान अवसरों पर केंद्रित हो। जाति, धर्म और भाषा की दीवारों से ऊपर उठकर हमें ऐसी राजनीति को बढ़ावा देना होगा जो आने वाली पीढ़ियों के लिए मज़बूत नींव तैयार करे।"

समापन (Conclusion):
"तो दोस्तों, राजनीति केवल नेताओं का काम नहीं – यह हर उस नागरिक का कर्तव्य है जो अपने देश से प्रेम करता है। याद रखिए, आपका एक वोट, आपकी एक राय, आपके देश का भविष्य बदल सकती है।

आइए, राजनीति को समझें, देश के लिए सोचें और एक जिम्मेदार नागरिक की तरह आगे बढ़ें। क्योंकि – देश हमसे है और हम देश से हैं।"

🎧 Outro Line:
"अगर आपको यह एपिसोड अच्छा लगा हो तो इसे ज़रूर शेयर करें और हमें अपने विचार बताएं। अगली बार फिर मिलेंगे एक नए विषय के साथ। जय हिंद!"

title: SBU Struggling Brothers United
author: Robert Bedard
description:
Struggling Brothers United

Breaking the Silence. Building Brotherhood. Standing Together.

Struggling Brothers United is more than a community—it's a brotherhood built for men who are facing life's silent battles. It exists for the man who appears strong on the outside but is carrying burdens no one else can see. Whether those struggles involve anxiety, depression, loneliness, addiction, grief, broken relationships, financial hardship, burnout, shame, loss of purpose, or the daily pressures of life, this brotherhood reminds every man that he does not have to fight alone.

Our mission is to create a safe, respectful, and authentic environment where men can remove the mask, speak honestly, and find encouragement through genuine relationships. We believe healing begins when silence is broken and burdens are shared.

Struggling Brothers United is founded on five core pillars that guide everything we do:

Identity

Helping men discover who they are beyond their failures, past mistakes, labels, and expectations. A man's worth is not determined by his circumstances but by his character and the person he is becoming.

Freedom

Breaking free from fear, shame, guilt, addiction, bitterness, unhealthy habits, and the emotional chains that keep men trapped. Freedom begins when we confront what holds us back instead of hiding from it.

Faith

Building a foundation of hope, trust, and spiritual strength. While rooted in Christian values, Struggling Brothers United welcomes every man with respect, regardless of where he is on his faith journey. We believe authentic conversations create opportunities for growth without judgment.

Purpose

Helping men rediscover meaning, direction, and hope for the future. Every man has unique gifts, experiences, and a story that can encourage someone else. Our purpose is not found in perfection but in perseverance.

Brotherhood

The heart of Struggling Brothers United. We believe no man was created to carry life's burdens alone. Through encouragement, accountability, compassion, and mutual support, we stand together as brothers who strengthen one another through every season of life.

Our Values

  • Authenticity over appearances.
  • Compassion over condemnation.
  • Encouragement over criticism.
  • Brotherhood over isolation.
  • Growth over perfection.
  • Hope over despair.
  • Service over selfishness.
  • Truth spoken with grace.

Who We Serve

Struggling Brothers United is for men from every walk of life who desire connection, encouragement, and personal growth. Whether you're navigating difficult seasons or simply looking for meaningful brotherhood, you belong here.

This is a place for men who are:

  • Carrying emotional or mental burdens.
  • Feeling isolated or alone.
  • Recovering from addiction or destructive habits.
  • Healing from trauma, loss, or broken relationships.
  • Experiencing burnout or overwhelming stress.
  • Seeking purpose and direction.
  • Looking for accountability and encouragement.
  • Wanting genuine friendships built on trust and respect.

Our Commitment

We are committed to creating a community where every member feels welcomed, heard, respected, and valued. We encourage honesty, confidentiality, kindness, and mutual support while fostering an atmosphere where healing, growth, and restoration can flourish.

No lectures.
No judgment.
No pretending.

Just real men.
Real conversations.
Real brotherhood.

Together, we carry what no man should carry alone.

Our Motto

Breaking the Silence. Building Brotherhood. Standing Together.

title: Country Education Partnership
author: Mark Mclay
description:
The Country Education Partnership is a not-for-profit organisation, we work to support the provision of high quality education within rural and remote communities across Victoria. CEP has an advocacy role across Australian Rural communities.
We work for, and on behalf of, all rural and remote education communities. We strive to ensure that learners within these communities have access to the highest quality of education provision from 0-18+ years across government and non-government education organisations.

To best service our rural communities we are guided by three main values:

Collaboration that fosters inclusiveness, participation, sharing and responsiveness to members.
Leadership that is proactive, professional and consultative.
Achievement that strives for constant development, and seeks challenge, excellence and celebration

Rural and remote communities contribute significantly to the economic prosperity and social fabric of our nation. We believe the provision of quality rural education is an essential component for the sustainability, growth and future of rural Australia.

Our approach for providing quality learning within these communities is to work collaboratively through locally developed, flexible partnerships that are innovative, creative and focus on the unique needs of that community.

The Country Education Partnership (CEP) has an enduring history of 40 plus years and is the pre-eminent organisation for rural and remote education. Our efforts continue to focus on:

Today, Country Education Partnership focuses on key areas of:

    advocating and representing rural and remote education communities to governments and education sectors.
    supporting rural and remote education communities in developing and providing innovative approaches to learning provision through a collaborative, place-based approach.
    developing a highly skilled workforce that is inclusive of education leadership, education staff and support staff.
    lifting the aspirations of rural and remote young people encouraging them to realise and pursue their dreams.

title: The Patriots: From Boston to Foxboro
author: Sports History Network
description: These days, the New England Patriots are often thought of as one of the elite teams in the NFL. However, that hasn’t always been the case, especially during the team’s infancy, when they were a charter member of the upstart AFL and chaos and confusion often reigned. The Patriots of the 60s and early 70s were a transient team and played its home games in no less than 5 different stadiums. The Pats also cycled thru its head coaches quite frequently back then and one coach in particular is often remembered as the one who best epitomized the team’s failings during this time. In this 4-part series, we will take a look at the team’s humble beginnings in Boston in 1960 to their first years in Foxboro. We will also do a deep dive into the timeline between 1969 – 1972 to relive some of the most shocking and bizarre events to ever impact a professional sports franchise. The Patriots: From Boston to Foxboro.

author: Joey
description: This is a podcast about how quality clothing is made, how to find the best quality, and how to maintain your garments so they last for years.

title: Steady Reset
author: Lauren
description: Steady Reset is a podcast about building a healthier, more balanced life through realistic fitness, nutrition, mindset, and sustainable habits. Each episode offers practical tips, honest conversations, and encouragement to help listeners make lasting changes without chasing perfection.

title: Let's Talk Christian
author: Lorraine Hopkins
description:
Let’s Talk Christian is a Christ-centered podcast committed to the truth of God’s Word. In a world full of opinions, we stand on one foundation—the Bible as the final authority.
Exploring relevant topics through a biblical lens, sharing the Gospel with those seeking salvation, guiding new believers in their walk with Christ, & encouraging seasoned believers to grow deeper in truth.
Through your questions, honest discussions, and interviews, we always ask one central question: “What does the Bible say?”
No matter the topic, the answer will always point back to God’s Word! Join Us today!

title: The Quiet Knowing Within: Your Midlife Awakening
author: M. I. Gnosis
description:
Welcome to The Quiet Knowing Within: Your Midlife Awakening.
There's a particular quiet that arrives in midlife. You did the things you were told would add up to a life, and most of them worked. So the flatness underneath isn't proof you failed — it may be a sign the old map no longer matches the ground you're standing on.
So, quietly, you begin to wonder. Is this all there is? Is this actually mine?
No manifestation hacks, no fluffy motivational hype. Just honest reflection, and better questions asked slowly enough to hear yourself answer.
Keep listening for the quiet knowing within.

title: Exploring the Mysteries of the World
author: Olivia & Noah
description:
Join Olivia and Noah as they explore urban legends, conspiracy theories, UFO mysteries, and unexplained phenomena in clear and easy-to-understand English.
We believe the fastest way to learn a language is through topics that genuinely capture your interest. Instead of memorizing vocabulary from textbooks, you'll improve your listening skills while diving into fascinating mysteries from around the world.
Whether you're an English learner, a mystery enthusiast, or simply curious about the unknown, each episode combines learning, excitement, and thought-provoking discussions.

title: Montey’s DeepHouseLounge Sessions
author: Monteyrsa23
description: LivingInDeep

title: AI Transformation Playbook Podcast
author: Eric Bannavti Suiseka
description: AI Transformation Playbook is a podcast for executives, business leaders, and transformation professionals navigating the opportunities and risks of artificial intelligence. Hosted by Scott Archibald, former Gartner leader and executive transformation strategist, and Eric Bannavti Suiseka, AI and digital literacy thought leader, each episode explores AI readiness, governance, leadership, workforce transformation, scaling strategies, and real-world lessons. Practical insights, candid conversations, and actionable frameworks help organizations accelerate AI adoption while reducing risk at scale.

title: The Court ODR Podcast
author: Colin Rule
description: In depth interviews with leading thinkers focused on how Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) tools and techniques can help courts and legal aid providers expand access to justice and promote fast and fair resolutions.

title: The First Step
author: Amy Botelho
description: It's the podcast by and for regular people, adults, in conversation and talking about their life experiences and what they've learned from them.  It's 12 Step meets StoryCorps meets your living room couch - comfortable, vulnerable, real.

title: The Hoax News Radio Hour
author: Nathaniel Harvey
description:
EST: 2026.

The Hoax News Radio Hour is a scripted storytelling podcast for stories about stories with fictional twist without any political or true stories that shouldn’t be libel & slandering in this podcast production. Those stories would be not true or based on actual events, just trying for fun & sense of laughter.

title: Rhapsody in 35MM
author: Catherine Goshen
description: Each season, we will focus on a particular genre of film and explore its roots in hopes to illuminate the shadows and dark corners of film history. Throughout each season, we will discuss aspects of film history that are routinely overlooked and provide little-known details on interesting parts of film history that should be brought to light.

title: Summit Atheltic's Podcast
author: DANIEL NAVON
description: Welcome to the Summit Athletics Podcast! I'm your host, Daniel Navon. This podcast is all about fitness, sports, and living an active lifestyle. Each episode covers topics like workout tips, motivation, athletic gear, healthy habits, and updates from Summit Athletics. Whether you're a student-athlete, a gym enthusiast, or just looking for ways to stay active, you'll find helpful advice and inspiration to support your fitness journey. Join us as we explore what it takes to stay motivated, reach your goals, and perform at your best.

title: Wise Words
author: wisemanthree
description: Wise Words is a podcast from wisemanthree featuring honest, unfiltered conversations on life, mindset, growth and modern living. Each episode explores real experiences, challenges and perspectives from guests and discussions that go beyond surface-level talk. If you enjoy thoughtful, relatable conversations that make you think and see things differently, this show is for you. Full episodes available on YouTube.

title: Be Well Besties
author: Centerstone Health
description:
Be Well Besties, an initiative of Centerstone, is a human-forward podcast about your brain, your nervous system, and what it means to be well.
Through honest conversations and clear, accessible brain science, the Besties offer simple practices that help you feel more regulated and less alone, especially in moments of change or overwhelm.
Your brain deserves a Bestie.

title: Can You Dig It? Podcast
author: Ella Lauser
description:
Can You Dig It? is a heartfelt, genre-jumping conversation between father and daughter, riffing on life, challenges, healing, and the music that scores it all. 
Featuring intimate moments, backstage memories, and laugh-out-loud lessons from a father who’s been playing professionally since the 1960s and a daughter raised on soundchecks and soul, this podcast is a groove through generations. 
Each episode brings honest conversation, turning points, and the soundtrack behind it all. It’s a father-daughter beat channeled by Ella Lauser and her father, David.

title: The 227 Podcast by Natalie Bunom
author: Natalie Bunom Brastad
description:
On a daily I meet a lot of quite interesting people and I want to share my stories with you! On this little silly podcast of mine I’ll deep dive into everything raw, honest and scary. Whether the be love, loss, heartbreak,grief and everything light and bright in between.

On this podcast we are asking and questioning great questions with the purpose of connecting myself to you and others. As I have a sneaky little feeling we are not so different after all.

A podcast where we get curious and share our little secrets,a place where shame has no space and place to be.

title: Expand and Impact
author: Violetta Znorkowski
description:
Expand and Impact is the podcast for capable women who lead, teach, care for others, and are building meaningful businesses, careers, and lives.
Hosted by Violetta Znorkowski, each episode explores the hidden patterns shaping how we think, feel, lead, and perform under pressure. Blending psychology, mind-body science, lived experience, and thought-provoking conversations, this show helps you build a healthier relationship with yourself so you can lead, create, and succeed without sacrificing your wellbeing, your ambition, or your joy.
Whether you're leading a team, growing a business, supporting others, or creating a life that reflects who you truly are, you'll discover practical insights that help you think more clearly, lead more intentionally, and enjoy the life you're working so hard to build.
Expand and Impact helps the people others rely on better understand themselves, so they can create extraordinary impact without carrying extraordinary pressure.

title: The AD Aesthete
author: Condé Nast
description: Listen in as the superlatively knowledgeable Mitchell Owens, Decorative Arts editor at AD (@ADaesthete), talks with the greatest design-world talents of our time about all things aesthetic. From the legacy of iconic decorators to the promise of design’s future, his lively, bold, and engaging conversations truly appeal to a mixed audience of industry pros and design enthusiasts. New episodes Tuesdays.

title: Kempner Canucks
author: RevTrev
description:
Welcome to my podcast. I create Canucks content that is passionate, realistic & honest. I'm a life long die-hard fan of the Vancouver Canucks! I'll give them credit when it's due and I'll rant when I'm frustrated. It's been decades of excitement, some painful moments & tons of disappointments. Through it all we stay faithful & say, "Go Canucks Go!" 
Follow me (RevTrev) on Kempner Canucks socials on X, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, & Instagram for Passionate, Realistic, & Honest Canucks Content. And NOW I'm doing audio podcasts everywhere.

title: Last Voyage of the Karluk: A True Arctic Survival Story
author: Robert Abram Bartlett
description:
When the Karluk, flagship of the Canadian Arctic Expedition, became trapped in relentless ice in August 1913, survival became a battle for the crew’s very existence. Robert Abram Bartlett, the expedition’s master, faced unimaginable odds as he led a desperate fight against nature's fury. As the ship drifted across the treacherous Beaufort and Chukchi seas, a chilling reality set in: they were at the mercy of the frigid Arctic. In January 1914, the ice finally claimed the Karluk, plunging the crew into a harrowing ordeal that would test their limits and resolve.

Listeners will journey alongside Bartlett and his men as they navigate the bleak, unyielding landscape of Wrangell Island, grappling with dwindling supplies, bitter cold, and the haunting specter of despair. Each day is a struggle, not just against the elements, but against the psychological toll of isolation and uncertainty. As they forge alliances and confront personal demons, the crew’s camaraderie and courage shine through the bleakness.

‘Last Voyage of the Karluk’ captivates with its raw account of human endurance and the will to survive against all odds. This memoir reveals not just the brutality of the Arctic, but the resilience of the human spirit. What choices will they make when survival hinges on impossible decisions? Discover the gripping tale of survival that will leave you questioning what you would do in their place.

title: TWC's Open Doors
author: Tahlequah Worship Center
description: Watch and listen in as Pastor Lance and Richard have insightful conversations about Christianity and Christian living, and give fresh, new perspectives.

title: Two Mikes Devotee
author: PCD
description:
Two Mikes Fan Podcast is a fan-made podcast dedicated to discussing and celebrating the broadcasting careers, opinions, and memorable moments of Mike Parry and Mike Graham.
The show focuses on the legacy of their famous partnership from talkSPORT, where the duo became known as “The Two Mikes.” Their chemistry, lively debates, humour, and unpredictable conversations made them one of the most entertaining double acts in UK sports and talk radio.
Typical episodes of the fan podcast include:
Revisiting classic Two Mikes radio moments and stories
Commentary on the personalities and broadcasting

title: The Electric Nation Podcast
author: Jonathan Elisha
description: Join us at the Electric Nation to learn about the status of the Electrician future at Electric Nation!

title: Forbidden Angels
author: Forbidden Angels
description:
Forbidden Angels is a cinematic music project that blends powerful storytelling with emotional, genre-crossing music. Through rap, pop, EDM, hardstyle, orchestral, and cinematic soundscapes, it explores themes of childhood, dreams, resilience, identity, and transformation. Inspired by manga aesthetics and epic visual narratives, Forbidden Angels tells the story of ordinary children and teenagers who face pain, manipulation, and adversity, only to discover that true strength comes not from revenge, but from confronting their inner darkness and protecting the child within. More than a music project, Forbidden Angels is an invitation to dream again, heal, and become the best version of yourself. https://forbiddenangelsofficial.com/
https://www.youtube.com/@ForbiddenAngelsOfficial

title: High Tide Beverages
author: High tide beverage
description: At High Tide, we create elevated experiences with premium hemp-derived THC products made for modern lifestyles. High Tide Beverages are crafted for those who want bold taste, fast-acting effects, and a refreshing alternative to traditional options. We combine standout flavors, consistent quality, and convenient formats that fit social plans, laid-back evenings, and everyday enjoyment. From our sparkling beverages to our edible lineup, we focus on helping our customers sip, snack, and unwind with confidence. We bring together innovation, taste, and feel-good energy in every product we offer. Explore a better way to sip and unwind with High Tide Beverages.

title: Echo World Podcast.
author: Echo World
description:
Echo World PodcastWelcome to Echo World, where every whisper hides a terrifying secret and every story lingers long after the final word.Step into a world of chilling horror, unsettling mysteries, supernatural encounters, and spine-tingling tales designed to keep you on the edge of your seat. From haunted houses and cursed objects to ghostly legends, psychological nightmares, and original scary stories, each episode takes you deeper into the darkness.Whether you're a lifelong horror fan or simply enjoy a good scare, Echo World delivers immersive storytelling that will haunt your imagination and make you think twice before turning off the lights.New episodes released regularly. Put on your headphones, embrace the darkness, and let the echoes begin... if you dare.
Echo World — Where fear never fades, and every echo tells a terrifying story.

title: The Unboxing Feeling Podcast
author: Joyce
description: Welcome to The Unboxing Feeling! This podcast is for Brazilians living in the US who miss home. Each episode talks about Brazilian culture, food, and the little things we miss most — plus a look at our monthly subscription box that brings a piece of Brazil straight to your door. Tune in, feel closer to home, and don't forget to subscribe!

title: The Jellyfish Manifesto
author: Risu Media
description: An interview podcast where we interview other creatives about their passions

title: Closed Hearts Radio
author: Lukas El Rei
description: This is the home of one-minute storytelling. Each video delivers a full, immersive story—dark, strange, funny, or haunting—in 60 seconds or less. From twisted endings to flash fiction with a punch, we prove that a great story doesn’t need to be long. If you love quick escapism, writing inspiration, or just seeing how much tension can fit into a single minute, you’re in the right place. Hit subscribe and get a fresh story in the time it takes to scroll.

title: That Muslimah Podcast
author: Aiman Khalid
description:
*********************************************
Soulful conversations. Empowering narratives.
*********************************************
That Muslimah is a Muslimah *who prioritize wellness, productivity, beauty and mindfulness for her Rabb.*

title: Internet Chikes
author: owen parker
description: Welcome to Internet Chicks, your destination for trending online content, viral media, and the latest creator updates. Internet Chicks brings together popular internet culture, exclusive content discoveries, and engaging entertainment in one place. Whether you're exploring trending creators or staying updated with what's popular across the web, Internet Chicks offers a simple and user-friendly experience. Visit Internet Chicks regularly to discover fresh content, explore new trends, and stay connected with the latest online entertainment.

title: The Third Eye Lounge
author: Katie, Molly and Nicole
description: The Third Eye Lounge podcast is your opportunity to grab your favorite drink and hang with three mediums who open up and share their unique journeys with their spiritual abilities in authentic conversations every week.

title: Lens and Life
author: Pete George
description: For years I went through the motions — shooting, editing, posting — but not really seeing. Somewhere along the way, photography stopped being about pictures and became about presence. Some of my clearest thinking came from places like Bali, where life slows down just enough to remind you what actually matters. Lens and Life is a podcast about perspective. Hosted by Australian storyteller and photographer Pete George, each episode explores the people, places, conversations, observations, and experiences that shape how we see the world. From travel and culture to creativity, everyday life, and the lessons hidden in ordinary moments, Lens and Life is about noticing what others walk past. Some episodes are personal reflections. Some are conversations with interesting people. Others begin with a simple observation and lead somewhere unexpected. If you've ever felt life moving too fast, this is an invitation to slow down, look closer, and see with purpose. Breath. Intent. Timing. A photographer's discipline, tuned to life.

title: Emerging Horizons
author: Rhythm Studio
description: Emerging Horizons dives into deep discussions on social consciousness, celebrating human connections that alter socio-political landscapes for good. Explore how communities and movements thrive, creating ripples of change. Each episode, we paint narratives of resilience, transformation, and collective power.

title: Water Your Garden
author: Woodward Sports Network
description:
Water Your Garden presented by Woodward Girls Club is a wellness podcast rooted in the belief that personal growth begins with you taking the time to pour into yourself. Each episode is an invitation to do just that. You’ll hear from inspiring guests from all walks of life!
Whether it’s learning about hormone balancing, meditation, ethical eating, skin care, or career growth, every episode is a chance to slow down and water your own garden - one impactful conversation at a time.

title: The Island & Friends
author: The Island & Friends
description: Welcome to The Island & Friends — the only podcast where paradise meets punchlines! I’m your host, and today we’re diving into the hilarious chaos of island life with my favorite crew of misfits.Picture this: coconuts falling at the wrong time, scooters that sound like lawnmowers, and friends who think sunscreen is optional. We’re here to laugh at ourselves, roast each other just enough to stay friends, and share stories that prove island living isn’t always as Instagram-perfect as it looks.So grab a cold drink, kick back, and get ready for jokes, banter, and the kind of friendship that survives even when someone eats the last slice of pizza. This is The Island & Friends — where the sun is hot, the laughs are hotter, and the only rule is: don’t take us too seriously!

title: The Good Life
author: LEL Foundation
description: Carmela and Cindy transverse 75 years of human services’ experience exploring real world conversations about life equity and equality for individuals with disabilities with heart warming clarity seeking a” Good Life“ for ALL people.

title: Memoirs of Orthodoxy
author: Bivin George
description: Every Christian has a story—marked by suffering, doubt, loss, or unexpected grace. Yet woven through each is a central question: how do we remain faithful to Christ?  Memoirs of Orthodoxy shares the personal testimonies of ordinary Orthodox Christian men and women navigating life's struggles in workplaces, homes, and communities worldwide. While the saints illuminate the path of the past, today’s faithful continue that journey in a modern world.  Created especially for the next generation, this podcast reminds believers that they are not alone in their hardships or questions. It is a space for anyone searching for authentic Orthodox voices, wondering if Christianity remains relevant, or curious about Orthodoxy not just as a doctrine, but as a living faith.  Through honest conversations, discover how timeless wisdom offers strength, purpose, and hope today. May these stories encourage and steady your own journey toward Christ. Welcome to The Memoirs of Orthodoxy!

title: Martha, Mary and Mayhem
author: Cassandra Barbato and Amber Jenks
description: Martha, Mary and Mayhem, hosted by Cassandra Barbato and Amber Jenks, is where truth confronts tradition and the Gospel shatters strongholds. With bold biblical teaching and candid conversation, we’re digging into Scripture, challenging inherited assumptions, and rediscovering the freedom, authority, and grace found in Christ.

title: CVRD
author: The Family Renaissance
description:
CVRD
Welcome to CVRD (pronounced “covered”), a prayer podcast by The Family Renaissance. Each episode is a guided prayer, providing space for you to connect with God on a deeper level. We believe that prayer is a powerful tool for building intimacy with God and experiencing the supernatural. At The Family Renaissance, we believe that God’s truth is the foundation of our lives, and we strive to incorporate truth into every aspect of our prayer and living. We also believe that trust in the Lord is essential, and we seek to inspire and encourage our listeners to trust God in all things. Whether y

title: Kylie Says - It's About to Get Real
author: Kylie Mojaddidi
description: Welcome to Kylie Says! This podcast is your very own self help partner. Here, Kylie, a blogger, mother, senior marketing executive and recovering perfectionist is going to get real on topics like spirituality, disordered eating, wellness, motherhood, friendships, marriage and more. Join Kylie as she continues exploring her own self journey, and connect through her deeply personal account of what it's like to start finding yourself in your 30s. Shit's about to get real. To connect with Kylie on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kyliemojaddidi/?hl=en To connect with Kylie's blog: http://www.goldenhourwithkylie.com

title: Custom Tackle Authority Podcast
author: Shawn Akemon
description: The Custom Tackle Authority Podcast brings together custom tackle makers, anglers, and fishing creators for real conversations about bait building, fishing culture, live content, and the passion behind custom tackle.

title: S.H.E IS MAGIC
author: Jadyn
description: I see you, I hear you, and I stand with you, in this space we search for things that light us up, find ways to shake our wild untamed hair, show up through the sunshine and the storm, and together work through the struggles that keep us from living our most authentic life.she is Magic is a reminder that we already are its our job to unlock the powers! this is a journey not a destination and no I don't have it all figured out but together we are gonna unlock magical doors and continue to propel each other forward. sis, you are worthy, strong, capable, resilient, and enough even on the days you don't believe it.

title: Tín Phát Packing
author: Tín Phát Packing
description:
Tín Phát Packing là đơn vị chuyên cung cấp các giải pháp đóng gói và thiết bị công nghiệp, đáp ứng nhu cầu của nhiều doanh nghiệp trong sản xuất và kinh doanh. Với định hướng mang đến những giải pháp phù hợp cho doanh nghiệp, Tín Phát Packing luôn chú trọng cung cấp các sản phẩm đáp ứng nhu cầu sử dụng thực tế, giúp khách hàng lựa chọn thiết bị phù hợp với quy mô và mục đích vận hành.

title: Never Time To Give Up
author: Captain Squirrel
description:
A nod to the classics with a note from the future. A project meant to encompass every call I wanted to make but never went through. Seriously, it's just me, calling you. Pick up the phone? :)

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Spoken In Confidence
author: Sana Manjeshwar
description:
What if the hardest conversations at work were the key to building trust, retaining talent, reducing risk, and creating a culture where people want to stay?
Spoken in Confidence with Sana Manjeshwar is a podcast for executives, HR leaders, compliance professionals, legal teams, managers, and workplace decision-makers who want to navigate conflict with more clarity, confidence, and care.
Hosted by Sana Manjeshwar, a former HR leader, employment lawyer, and organizational ombudsman, this podcast explores workplace conflict, conflict intelligence, psychological safety, speaking up, leadership accountability, employee trust, compliance, and healthier workplace cultures.
Each episode features real stories, practical tools, and honest conversations with leaders who chose to handle conflict differently. Listeners will gain insight into how high-performing organizations surface concerns early, build safer channels for employee voice, reduce costly turnover, and strengthen trust across teams.
Follow Spoken in Confidence and learn how today's leaders can turn conflict into a strategic advantage while creating workplaces where people feel safe to share, stay, and do their best work.

title: The Nail Tech Society
author: Melanie Lewendon
description: The Nail Tech Society is a space for nail technicians who want real understanding, not just trends. Each episode explores the why and how behind technique, products, and building a successful career in the nail industry. Honest conversations, brand neutral education, and no gatekeeping.

title: JRB Foundation Repair's Podcast
author: JRB Foundation Repair
description: JRB Foundation Repair in Stryker, OH

title: Chipeez One Minute Interviews.
author: Chip
description: 3 one-minute interviews. By potato chip lovers for potato chips lovers.

title: Gospel Grandpas
author: Taylor, Daylan, Landon, Jacob
description: This podcast was started by four friends who meet every Saturday morning to talk about the Bible and edify one another. Come take a seat, we are glad you are here.

title: No Halo Required
author: Brock and Tony
description:
No Halo Required is a Christian podcast for people who love Jesus but don’t pretend to have it all together.

Hosted by Brock and Tony, two regular guys having real conversations about faith, life, struggles, culture, relationships, and the questions Christians sometimes avoid. No churchy performances. No pretending. No judgment. Just honest conversations, biblical truth, plenty of humor, and two imperfect men trying to follow Jesus in the middle of real life.

Whether your faith is strong, struggling, complicated, or you’re simply curious about Christianity, there’s a seat for you at the table.

Real Faith. No Filter. No Halo Required.

title: Caring Greatly
author: Heart of Safety Coalition
description: Caring Greatly is a destination where listeners are inspired to grow, lead and drive transformation to improve healthcare. This interview-style podcast creates space for people to share their perspective and connect to human-centered stories that reveal solutions, spark innovation and provide hope for a safer and brighter future of caring. The podcast is hosted by Stryker's Heart of Safety Coalition, a national community healthcare leaders, learners and advocates working to improve the safety and wellbeing of all who work in healthcare.

title: Girl, Join the Club
author: emm
description:
We keep it Raw and Real over here! There's no topic that won't be discussed. Please feel free to say what's on your mind. Feedback is always appreciated!! 
Should you have any questions about advice, please send your questions to askemmthegem@gmail.com. Or feel free to message me @girltalkrawandreal on IG.

title: Dumber School

description: An educational podcast that provides thoughtful commentary by analyzing pop culture through the eyes of a literature professor

title: A Boggle at BeWILDerwood
author: Tom Blofeld
description: Embark on a WILD adventure with Swampy and his friends. From the marshy Boggle Village and the beautiful Twiggle Village, all the way to the Scary Lake, explore the magical world of BeWILDerwood! Written and read by author and creator Tom Blofeld.

title: Operation Education
author: Pritesh Raichura / Bunsen Blue
description: Hosted by Pritesh Raichura and Neena Sharma. Concrete classroom strategies have the power to transform our teaching practice. Operation Education, a Bunsen Blue production, explores such strategies and connects them to the bigger picture of classroom culture, school leadership and the educational landscape.

title: The Buster Cast
author: BusterGoesBack
description:
A Santa Monica lawyer reached into his grow tent and fell out of the 21st century. The Bustercast is the story behind the story.
Join hosts Maya and Dan in the studio as they unpack the Busterverse: the world of Buster Goes Back, the pulp comedy time travel series about Roger 'Buster' Dalton, an entertainment lawyer whose routine Gorilla Grow Tent order turned out to be a doorway into all of history. Each episode digs into the characters, the eras and the lore, from ancient Babylon to Georgian Dublin to a POW camp deep in Silesia, plus the bigger mystery underneath it all: why the Dalton famil

title: Noted Stories
author: David Ray Skinner
description: Noted Stories is a weekly podcast that explores the true stories behind the songs of artist and songwriter David Ray Skinner. Drawing from more than 50 years of songwriting, each 24–25 minute episode features two or three of Skinner's original songs, along with the inspiration, experiences, and moments that gave them life.

title: The B* Word
author: Owls Education Company
description:
Welcome to The B* Word Podcast, a bold and empowering journey that dives into the words and worlds women are often hesitant to explore. In a society quick to label assertive women with the 'B* word', this podcast reclaims and celebrates attributes like 'Bold', 'Brave', 'Brilliant', and 'Beautiful'. Each week, join us as we unravel the layers of expectations and stereotypes, engaging in candid discussions about the challenges and triumphs of being a woman in today's world.
From personal stories of bravery and resilience to expert insights on breaking barriers, The B* Word Podcast is your space for unfiltered conversations. Whether we're talking about career, relationships, self-care, or societal norms, no topic is off-limits. Our mission? To inspire and empower you to embrace all aspects of your identity without fear or apology.
Tune in, join the conversation, and embrace the B* words that define you on your own terms. Because here, being called 'Bold', 'Brilliant', or even the 'B* word' is a reason for celebration, not shame. Welcome to The B* Word Podcast – where every 'B* word' is a badge of honor.
Subscribe and let's start redefining what it means to be a woman, one powerful 'B* word' at a time.

title: The Nights Watch
author: Jim Powell
description:
Welcome to The Night’s Watch.
I’m Jim Powell, featured on MonsterQuest (Season 5, Episode 8), host of The Night’s Watch, investigator, filmmaker, and storyteller exploring the world of Bigfoot, cryptids, UFOs, paranormal encounters, and the unexplained from a grounded Christian perspective.
Whether I’m deep in the Appalachian Mountains searching for evidence, interviewing eyewitnesses, sitting down with researchers, or documenting strange events in the field, my goal is simple: follow the evidence wherever it leads.

title: The Double Down Podcast
author: Turk
description: Welcome to The Double Down Podcast, where three friends talk sports, debate the biggest headlines, and never back down from a hot take. From the NFL, NBA, NHL, and college sports to random conversations and hilarious arguments, no topic is off limits. Expect bold opinions, friendly trash talk, plenty of laughs, and the kind of conversations you’d have with your own friends. New episodes every week.

title: Her Career Coach
author: Christina Storey
description: Welcome to the Her Career Coach Podcast, where women who dream big come to thrive. This empowering and inspiring podcast hosted by Christina Storey helps you to break free from limitations, elevate your career, and create a life that sets your soul on fire!

title: Travel Because You Can
author: Personal Travel Management
description: Travel Because You Can pulls back the curtain on the business of travel. title: Let Us Survive: An Oral History of Sex Worker Movements Before and After FOSTA-SESTA
author: Hacking//Hustling Collective
description:
The community response to the United States bills known as FOSTA-SESTA represents a sea change in American sex worker organizing. Supposedly, these bills were intended by their Congressional authors to change how the internet is regulated in order to make the country safer for victims of sex trafficking. 


We’ll talk plenty over the course of this podcast series about how that was supposed to work, and why it hasn’t. 


Let Us Survive, an oral history project by sex workers for everyone, covers a decade of American sex worker justice movements, roughly 2013 to 2023. It also gazes towards the future: of the industry, and of our labor organizing.  


This podcast does something that US Congress didn’t do: we listen to sex worker voices. Voices along the Choice-Circumstance-Coercion spectrum. We explore how sex workers use technology to keep ourselves safe, to build community and culture, to not only survive but thrive. We listen to our fellow sex workers and survivors as we talk about our movements, how we’ve responded to FOSTA-SESTA and other policies. How we feel about federal raids on internet platforms like RentBoy and Backpage. How we feel about the Communications Decency Act and freedom of speech. What we believe reproductive justice activists and others can learn from sex worker organizing. Why we’re fighting for the decriminalization of sex work, and how that will only be the beginning of the changes we need to see. 


“Sex worker” as defined by the Hacking//Hustling collective is: A political, unifying, umbrella term for people who sell sex — or performances, materials, or services associated with sex acts — in exchange for resources. 


So over the course of four episodes, you’ll be hearing the voices of full service workers, strippers, pro-doms, cam models, pornographers, and more. People who work in hotels and on the street, in clubs and in their homes. People who sell digital content online, and people who use the internet to market their services. 


Workers, survivors, activists, and allies from all over the United States who have built solidarity and collapsed binaries. 


People whose political identity as sex workers intersects with other identities both marginalized and privileged, as experts in harm reduction and tech privacy, as lawyers, as advocates, as parents, as drug users, as doulas, as bloggers, and so much more.


Let Us Survive interviews Lakeesha Harris of Chicago Volunteer Doulas; Desiree Collins of the Colorado Entertainer Coalition; Jared Trujillo of CUNY Law School; Chibundo Egwuatu of HIPS (Honoring Individual Power and Strength) in DC, Elizabeth Ricks of the Trans Life Care Program at Chicago House; Melissa Gira Grant, author of Playing the Whore, Marla Cruz, a sex worker and writer from Texas, Caty Simon of Whose Corner Is it Anyway in Massachusetts; Kate D’Adamo of Reframe Health and Justice, and M of APAC (Adult Performer Advocacy Committee) in Los Angeles, along with Danielle Blunt, Red, and zara raven of Hacking//Hustling.


This podcast was hosted, produced, written, recorded, and edited by Tina Horn and Mickey Mod, with additional production support from Christopher Holloway.


To learn about this project, other research by Hacking//Hustling, and more about the past, present, and future of sex worker movements, please visit HackingHustling.org. 


These interviews were conducted in 2023. Some facts and perspectives may have evolved since then.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

description:
Youth sports can be one of the greatest experiences of your family's life. It can also be one of the most overwhelming. 
Between the recruiting pressure, the tournament schedules, the team drama, and the constant noise about what your kid should be doing next, it's easy to lose sight of why you started in the first place. Inside the Circle with Coach Pat cuts through all of it. 
Coach Pat is a youth and travel softball coach with over 20 years of experience and a track record of helping dozens of athletes reach college softball. Known for his calm, firm coaching style and his belief that sport is one of the best classrooms life has to offer, Coach Pat brings the inside perspective that most people in youth sports don't want to say out loud. 
Every episode features honest conversations with college coaches, tournament directors, travel ball organizations, and people who've built programs that last. We talk about team culture, player development, coaching fundamentals, the recruiting process, and the mindset that keeps families grounded when the pressure gets loud. 
This show is for the parents sitting in the bleachers trying to figure it all out. It's for the new coach who wants to do right by their players. And it's for the athlete who is starting to take the game seriously and wants to understand what the journey ahead really looks like. 
Every kid's journey is unique and this show exists to help you navigate yours.

description: Join WWE Superstar Cody Rhodes as he invites WWE Superstars & Legends, athletes and celebrities aboard his bus for an unfiltered conversation about all things wrestling and beyond. Cody and his guests share never-before-heard stories from the road, their favorite matches and moments from their careers, and candid opinions on the world of wrestling.

title: Sunday Safe Spaces
author: Open Up
description: This is a monthly program hosted by April Jackson and Wesley Hamilton every third Sunday of the month. Join them on their podcast for insightful discussions that dive into pressing issues, hot topics, and current events, featuring a diverse lineup of guests. April and Wesley draw from their lived experiences at the intersections of race and disability, creating an inclusive and thought-provoking dialogue. Through personal stories and expert insights, they explore healing and wellness tools for the mind and body, with the aim of inspiring and empowering listeners. With 43 episodes and over 50 guests sharing lived experiences, the podcast is dedicated to supporting the community by fostering connection and understanding, especially in a society where marginalization is all too common. Tune in for conversations that challenge, inform, and uplift.

title: Prosperity Post
author: Nicky Larkin
description:
Welcome to Prosperity Post.
Positive stories. Smart thinking. Practical solutions.
Every month we cut through the headlines to bring you the business news and insights that matter most to business owners.
In each episode, we cover:
🇬🇧 The biggest UK business stories
🌍 The global developments worth watching
📈 An inspiring business success story
🔮 Future trends and opportunities

Our goal is simple: to help you understand what matters, what it means for your business, and what to do next.
Subscribe and join us live on the first Friday of every month.
#BusinessNews #BusinessGrowth #BusinessOwner #UKBusiness #Leadership #BusinessStrategy #ProsperityPost

This show is centered on leadership and personal growth as we learn from conversations with STEM leaders who've been doing it for years, seasoned professionals that will go deeper on leadership competencies so we can get better, and you'll also hear from Paul Faronbi, a Maxwell Leadership Certified Speaker & Coach who is very passionate about being incredible!

title: Internet Boyfriend
author: Rey Ortiz
description: "Welcome to Internet Boyfriend- the podcast that's equal part Comfort, Chaos, and Conversation. Whether you're driving home, cleaning your room or avoiding your responsibilities, Im here to keep you company. Expect dating stories, life updates, internet culture and the occasional existential crisis."

title: Inside EDM Society
author: Jennylyn
description:
Inside EDM Society takes you behind the scenes of the electronic dance music world. Each episode explores festival culture, artist spotlights, new music, travel tips, rave experiences, and the latest happenings in the EDM community.


Whether you're preparing for your first festival or you've been part of the scene for years, this podcast is your place to discover new artists, hear real stories, and stay connected with everything EDM. Join us as we celebrate the music, the community, and the unforgettable experiences that bring people together.

title: Born to B2B
author: The Think Tank
description: Liam Bateman, founder of award-winning B2B marketing and PR agency The Think Tank, will be talking to some of the industry's top talent, inviting them to share their stories, insights and ideas. Each episode, Liam and his guest will bust myths, divulge secrets and have a bit of fun talking about the industry whilst tackling some of the big B2B questions.

title: Her Words, Her World
author: Jaime Dugan
description:
Empowering women's voices, one story at a time.

Embark on a transformative global journey with "Her Words, Her World," a podcast that explores the power of women's literacy to change lives and shape communities. Each episode invites you into the heart of a woman's story — her struggles, her triumphs, and her unshakeable determination to write a better future.

We'll introduce you to remarkable women who are shattering barriers and redefining what's possible through the power of the written word. You'll hear from pioneering educators, fearless activists, visionary entrepreneurs, and everyday heroines who are transforming their families and communities one page at a time.

But this is more than a celebration of individual achievements. As we weave together these intimate narratives, a powerful tapestry emerges — one that reveals the critical role of women's literacy in advancing gender equality, economic development, public health, and social progress worldwide. With each story, you'll gain a deeper understanding of the complex challenges women face in accessing education, and the innovative solutions that are making a difference.

Whether you're a lifelong learner, a passionate advocate, or simply someone who believes in the boundless potential of the human spirit, "Her Words, Her World" will inspire, inform, and ignite your commitment to creating a more just, more literate world for all.

description:
How can a mine, a road or a prison be criminal? Material Crimes answers this question, investigating the “true crimes” of infrastructure. We explore how the physical sites of everyday life are connected to global histories of conquest, resource extraction, profit-making – and resistance!


Check out our website: materialcrimes.com


Get in touch: materialcrimespodcast@gmail.com

From daily hygiene routines and preventive care to the latest advancements in dentistry, this episode provides practical insights for patients of all ages. Get ready to laugh from start to finish and discover why everyone is sharing this podcast. Hit play, subscribe, and join the community that turns any bad day into nonstop laughs!

title: Way Back Wrestling
author: Nick Alexander
description:
From 10 Bell Pod:


Way Back Wrestling digs into the strange, half forgotten roots of professional wrestling: the strongmen, shooters, barnstormers, promoters, champions, and carnival legends who built the sport before TV turned it into a national spectacle.

Hosted by Nick Alexander, these solo episodes explore figures like Doc Roller, J.H. McLaughlin, Viro Small, Farmer Burns, and the early wrestling world were history, myth, newspapers, and kayfabe all started getting tangled together.

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: The Wildest Show on Earth
author: Sean Olsen
description:
﻿Before Instagram. Before influencers. Before social media made the world feel small, there was Wild On!.

For half a decade, a small group of E! Entertainment producers chased the sun, fun and biggest parties on Earth. Wild On! was E! Entertainment's late-night, sexy travel series that traveled from the beaches of Ibiza to the streets of Rio, from Carnival to Cannes - Wild On! brought viewers the places they dreamed about, the people they couldn't take their eyes off, and enough late-night mischief and nudity to keep Standards & Practices on edge.


But what happened when the cameras stopped rolling?


This is the untold story of the show that changed travel television forever. Hear first-time stories, outrageous adventures, impossible shoots, celebrity encounters, behind-the-scenes chaos, and the moments that almost never made it to air. Former producers Cary Millman, Paul Haddad and Sean-Patrick Olsen interview former hosts, Playboy Playmates, and favorite guests for a chance to reminisce and recount their days producing the show that left an imprint on a generation...


This is The Wildest Show on Earth: The Rise and Fall of Wild On!

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: The Real Deal with HD Cassidy
author: HD Cassidy
description: Hosted by HD Cassidy, The Real Deal Dream Interpreter, this podcast dives into raw, unfiltered conversations on healing, growth, and real-life experiences. As a trauma-experienced life coach, HD brings wisdom from dream interpretation, trauma recovery, and personal transformation. She talks with people from all walks of life about health, fitness, sexuality, second marriages, and family. Whether you're looking for insight, inspiration, or a place where truth is spoken boldly, this is the podcast that delivers. No fluff—just The Real Deal.

title: The Leadership Shift
author: Caroline Huffam
description:
Honest conversations about what it really takes to lead at the next level.

 

Leadership isn't something people should have to figure out alone.

 

The Leadership Shift is a fortnightly podcast hosted by Caroline Huffam and Corinne Hollidge, founders of Synergy for Growth — and your honest guide to what it really takes to lead at the next level.

 

Every episode explores the realities of leadership in today's world. The complexity. The pressure. The uncertainty. And the conversations that don't always happen openly enough — because too many leaders are performing successfully on the surface whilst quietly carrying the weight of it all behind the scenes.

 

Because here's what we know from years of working with leaders across organisations and sectors: leadership isn't simply about delivering outcomes. It's about creating the conditions in which people can contribute, collaborate, and succeed together. And making that shift — from operational success to strategic leadership — is one of the most significant transitions any leader will face.

 

Across five core themes, we explore what that shift really looks like:

 

Leadership Transition — why stepping up is harder than it looks, and how to navigate it successfully

Human-Centred and Commercially Grounded Leadership — because people and performance are not competing priorities

Embedded Development — leadership isn't learned in theory; it's learned in the reality of the role

Sustainable Leadership — because leaders shouldn't have to lose themselves in order to succeed

Leading Through Uncertainty — creating clarity and confidence even when you don't have all the answers

 

Whether you're stepping into greater responsibility, leading through change, or supporting leadership development inside your organisation — this podcast is for you.

 

Connect with us & continue the conversation:

synergyforgrowth.co.uk

Caroline on LinkedIn

Corinne on LinkedIn

Synergy for Growth on LinkedIn

 

We'd love to hear what resonates. Connect with us and share the leadership challenge you're navigating right now.

description: What does it mean to be a men in the 21st century? This podcast is dedicated to help men adapt to the demands and changes of the world. We help with clear definitions of what it means to be a respected and respectful man who confidently provides and makes a success out of himself.

title: The Age of Caregiving: Balancing Work, Life & Care

description:
Welcome to The Age of Caregiving, where work doesn’t stop, life keeps moving, and caregiving becomes the second job no one trained you for.

Hosted by Dr. Anna Thomas—physician, caregiver advocate, and leadership coach—this podcast is your weekly guide to navigating the complex realities of modern caregiving. Whether you’re balancing a career while caring for a parent, partner, or child, or you're a leader trying to support employees who are caregiving, this space is for you.

Each episode delivers real talk, practical strategies, and compassionate leadership tools to help you care without losing yourself in the process.

It’s time to stop surviving caregiving—and start leading through it.

New episodes every week.
Subscribe now and join the movement redefining what it means to thrive in the Age of Caregiving

title: Built on Solid Rock Podcast
